neighborhoods.name: Auch Centre
neighborhoods.description: Historic hilltop capital of Gascony with its grand stairway, cathedral, and old town overlooking the Gers river
neighborhoods.character: Historic hilltop, provincial capital, Gascon culture

housing.predominantType: Apartments in historic buildings and townhouses

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Auch. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: L'Isle-Jourdain
neighborhoods.description: Market town between Auch and Toulouse with easy access to both, lake recreation, and modern amenities
neighborhoods.character: Market town, convenient location, lake recreation

housing.predominantType: Modern houses, apartments, and rural properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Auch's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Condom
neighborhoods.description: Small town on the Baise river with Armagnac heritage, affordable stone houses, and pilgrim trail culture
neighborhoods.character: Small riverside, Armagnac country, Camino de Santiago
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Lectoure
neighborhoods.description: Beautiful hilltop bastide town with growing British expat community, thermal spa, and artisan shops
neighborhoods.character: Hilltop bastide, spa town, artistic expat community

housing.predominantType: Renovated stone houses and bastide apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
